chapters.title: Chapter 4 -- The loop eats first
chapters.summary: An AI-driven search for cat-qubit outer codes, refereed at circuit level against Amazon's published Ocelot chip. Four pre-registered bets: two hit, two missed. The measured, model-level lesson -- codes must match their bias regime -- plus the explicit winning [24,4,12] code, a reproducibility section, and a ten-entry ledger of the machinery's own caught errors. A proof of principle (the loop turned once), not a hardware demonstration.
